title: ASR Outdoor Ultimate Dry Sack 40L PVC Water Resistant 9 Inch Diamater
description:
Keep your gear dry with the ASR Outdoor 40L Dry Sack! This Dry Sack is a great way to haul your gear while camping, kayaking, hiking, boating or rafting. Each sack will hold up to 40L and has a 9" diameter. The two-tone body is constructed of 500D/PVC Tarpaulin, making it extremely durable and water resistant. It comes with a sturdy buckle to keep your gear safely sealed inside. Don't go on your next outdoor adventure without one of these!

ASR Outdoor Ultimate Dry Sack 40L PVC Water Resistant 9 Inch Diamater

Keep your gear dry with the ASR Outdoor 40L Dry Sack!

Key Features

  • 2 Tone Body w/ Transparent Top Half
  • 500D/PVC Tarpaulin Material; Water Resistant
  • Sturdy Buckle to Keep Gear Sealed

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 40LMDS
  • UPC: 629858500526
  • Color: Red
  • Size: Medium

This Dry Sack is a great way to haul your gear while camping, kayaking, hiking, boating or rafting. Each sack will hold up to 40L and has a 9" diameter.

The two-tone body is constructed of 500D/PVC Tarpaulin, making it extremely durable and water resistant. It comes with a sturdy buckle to keep your gear safely sealed inside.
